creator: Karli.Sjoberg@slu.se
text:
Running www/py-graphite-web is impossible since django was updated to 1.8.1 a couple of days ago:
http://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/www/py-django/Makefile?r1=382362&r2=385238&pathrev=385238

Have a bunch of storage servers running graphite and two of them since updating django cannot start any more, throws this error in apache log:
"ImproperlyConfigured: Creating a ModelForm without either the 'fields' attribute or the 'exclude' attribute is prohibited; form TagAdminForm needs updating."

The others still running 1.7.X are OK.

Best Regards
Karli Sjöberg
